titleStmt.title: SII 36.220: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 220. (A.R. No. 220 of 1910.) PĀḌI (Tiruvalidāyam), SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the west and south walls of the central shrine in the Tiruvallīśvara temple.

summary.p: (Śaka 1548 (wrong), Nandana, Mēsham, śu., 7, Wednesday, Pūsam = A.D. 1472, April 15, Wednesday.)

Assignment of 21 chōḍi paṇam from Irāchāchiraiya-chaturvēdimaṅgalam alias Agaram Kuṟaṭṭūr as a sarvamānya gift of Sāḷuva Bommaiyadēva Mahārāja, for maintaining five lamps in the temple of Pāḍi Tiruvallidāyam in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam alias Ambattūr-nāḍu in Vikramachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, a subdivision of Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī man mahāmaṇṭalīśvara harihara Irāyavigāṭan bhāṣaikkut tappuvarāyar kaṇṭan mūvarāyarkaṇṭan Inturāya curattāṉ pūrvva dakṣiṇa paccima Uttara samuttiṟātipati
śrī vīrappiṟatāpa virupākṣayadevamahārāyaṟku cellā niṉṟa cagābdam 1000 5 100 4 10 8 ṉ mel cellāniṉṟa nandaṉa varuṣattu meṣa nāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu sapdamiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu vikkiṟamacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu puḻaṟ koṭṭamāṉa Ampattūr nāṭṭu pāṭi tiruvallitāyattil Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku Irācāciṟaiya caturvvedimaṅkalamāṉa Akaram kuṟaṭṭūr
teṟkil Akaram vaṭakkil Akarattil makājaṉam muṉṉāḷ nāyiṉār tiruvallitāyamuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku viṭṭa tiruviḷakkuppaṭikku naṭakkiṟa coṭi paṇam Irupattu Oṉṟum śrīman mahā
maṇṭalīśvara metiṉimisarakaṇṭa kaṭṭāri sāḷuva pommaiyadeva mahārājāviṉ cīrmaiyāka naṭakkaiyil pommaiyadeva mahārājāviṉ tarmmamāka Uṭaiyār tiruvallitāyamuṭai
ya nāyiṉār tirumuṉpe tiruṉuntāviḷakkāka niṟṟam nālu tiruviḷakkum mahājaṉattiṉ tiruviḷakku Oṉṟum Āka Añcu tiruviḷakkum tappāmal yiṭakaṭavatākavum Intat tiruviḷakkup pa
ṭikku pūṟuvamāka naṭantuvarukiṟa coṭi paṇam yirupattoṉṟum sarvvamānyamāka pommaiyadeva mahārājāviṉ taṉmamāka candrādityavaraiyum naṭakkakaṭavatāka
vum Ittat taṉmattukku yātoru Akutam paṇṇiṉavar Uṇṭāṉāl gaṅkaik karaiyiṟ kārām pacuvaik koṉṟa pāvattile pokak kaṭava
ippaṭikku Ivai pommaiyadeva mahārājāviṉ Eḻuttu § mahājaṉa Aruḷic ceyaṟpaṭikkuk kuṟaṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu
paṉmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 36.220 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
